overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from The Witcher 3 showing Geralt walking through a medieval stone castle at night, transitioning from torch-lit interior corridors to open battlements, passing through a gate with a horse-drawn cart, and finally emerging into a pine forest with mountains in the background.

events.description: exits narrow wooden corridor into stone courtyard with campfire

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through torch-lit stone corridors and emerging into a small courtyard

entered.detail: rough-hewn stone wall forming the left boundary of the corridor
rough-hewn stone wall forming the right boundary of the corridor
wooden plank flooring of the elevated walkway
heavy timber beams supporting the wooden structure
wall-mounted torches providing warm orange lighting
burning fire pit in the courtyard ahead
stone arch leading to the next area of the castle

segments.scene_description: The segment begins in a narrow, torch-lit stone corridor with wooden walkways. The character walks forward through the enclosed space, transitioning at around 6 seconds into a small stone courtyard with a burning campfire visible ahead.

events.description: sky becomes visible as character exits enclosed courtyard, changing from torch-only to mixed moonlight and torch lighting
slight right turn while walking along the castle wall ramparts

agents.ego_description: walking along elevated castle walls with night sky visible, passing under wooden bridge structures

entered.detail: cylindrical stone tower with narrow windows
wooden walkway bridge spanning across the path overhead
warm lights from buildings visible in the distance beyond the castle

segments.scene_description: The character emerges onto open castle battlements where the night sky is visible. The lighting shifts from warm torchlight to a mix of moonlight and fire. The path follows stone walls with a round tower on the left and wooden bridges overhead, approaching a distant gatehouse.

events.description: horse-drawn cart comes into view near the gate
character passes through the portcullis gate into a dark tunnel

agents.ego_description: approaching the castle gate, passing a stationary horse and cart, then moving through the portcullis into a darker passage

notable_agents.action: white horse harnessed to a wooden cart, standing stationary near the gate

entered.detail: heavy wooden and metal portcullis blocking the gate entrance
wooden cart with white horse harnessed to it
large stone archway framing the gate entrance
shadowy passage beyond the gate leading outside

segments.scene_description: The character approaches the castle's main gate where a white horse stands harnessed to a cart. After passing the animal, the character moves through the portcullis gate, transitioning from the open battlements into a darker, enclosed tunnel passage.

events.description: exits the castle gate into open wilderness with pine forest and mountains

agents.ego_description: walking along a dirt path through dense pine forest with snow-capped mountains visible in the distance

entered.detail: dense evergreen trees lining the left side of the path
snow-capped mountain peaks visible in the distance
unpaved dirt trail winding through the forest
small wooden footbridge crossing a stream or depression

segments.scene_description: The character emerges from the castle into a wide-open wilderness area. The stone walls give way to a dirt path through dense pine forest with majestic snow-capped mountains rising in the distance under the night sky. The artificial torchlight is replaced by natural moonlight illuminating the landscape.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from the claustrophobic, torch-lit depths of a stone fortress out onto its expansive, moonlit battlements. It begins within a narrow stone corridor lined with wooden walkways, moving forward through the enclosed space until it opens into a small courtyard centered around a burning campfire. As the character advances, the scene shifts from the warm, flickering glow of interior torches to the cool light of the night sky upon emerging onto the open castle walls. The path then follows the stone fortifications past a round tower and beneath wooden bridges, finally extending toward a distant gatehouse under a mix of moonlight and fire.

The shot follows a continuous camera movement that transitions from the structured stone confines of a castle gate into the vast, moonlit expanse of a mountain wilderness. It begins as the character approaches the main gate, passing a white horse harnessed to a cart before moving through the portcullis. The scene then shifts from the open battlements into the oppressive darkness of an enclosed tunnel passage. As the character emerges from the tunnel, the stone walls give way to a dirt path winding through a dense pine forest. Finally, the artificial torchlight is replaced by natural moonlight, revealing majestic snow-capped mountains rising in the distance under the night sky.
